_comment: Declarative workflow definition for curriculum-mapping. Builds pacing guides, curriculum maps, and scope & sequence documents by sequencing standards across a time span with coherence and coverage checks.
description: Long-range curriculum plan: standards coverage → unit sequence → pacing → quality gate

steps.note: Pull the full standards set for the grade/subject/time span
Write unit-level goals (SWBAT) to anchor each unit in the map
Flag known conceptual gaps to inform sequencing and pacing decisions
Annotate each unit with differentiation flags (ELL, IEP, gifted checkpoints)

note: Coverage check (all required standards placed once) and pacing realism are the critical gates for this skill.
